title: habenaria lelyi var. lelyi
intro: Habenaria lelyi var. lelyi, also known as the Lely's Habenaria, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health issues. The Lely's Habenaria has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the roots or leaves in hot water.
